name: Oysters and Artichoke Casserole
recipeIngredient: A pinch of thyme, salt, pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook artichoke hearts as directed on package.
2. Place in a flat, buttered casserole.
3. Cover with sauteed mushrooms.
4. Cook oysters in their liquid until edges begin to curl. Drain thoroughly in colander, reserving liquid.
5. Melt butter and saute onion until tender; add parsley and cook for a minute.
6. Add flour, stirring until smooth.
7. Add enough white wine to oyster liquid to make 1 1/2 cups.
8. Add seasonings and stir constantly until thick.
9. Add oysters and spoon mixture over artichokes and mushrooms.
10. Arrange lemon slices over top; add a dash or two of paprika.
11. Bake at 350 degrees for about 10 minutes, or until bubbling.
